title: EvidenceRiskProfile
description: Structured content extracted from an Attitude-to-Risk (ATR) profiling document. Captures questionnaire reference, risk band, and key scoring outcomes.

itemId.description: Service-assigned unique identifier for this evidence item within the index.

assessmentDate.description: Date and time the risk profile assessment was completed.

expiresAt.description: Date the assessment expires and must be renewed (typically assessmentDate + 365 days).

riskBand.description: Categorised risk appetite band derived from the questionnaire score.

riskScore.description: Raw numeric risk score from the questionnaire (0 = lowest risk, 100 = highest).

questionnaireRef.description: Identifier of the ATR questionnaire version used (e.g. FinaMetrica-v4, Dynamic-Planner-2025).

adviserRef.description: FCA-registered adviser number or internal CRM adviser ID who conducted the assessment.

capacityForLoss.description: Adviser's assessment of the client's capacity for financial loss, distinct from attitude to risk.

knowledgeAndExperience.description: MiFID II / COBS 10 knowledge and experience classification.

notes.description: Free-text adviser notes on risk suitability rationale.
